/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/livepaper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/src/livepapercontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/src/wallpapermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/livepaper_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_LivePaper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/livepaper_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/livepaper_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_livepaper_raw_qml_0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livepaper.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_livepaper_raw_qml_0_extra_qmldirs.cpp.o -o livepaper  /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
